source_jobs.description:
<p><span style="font-family: 'trebuchet ms', geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 12pt;"><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">At  </span></span><strong><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">ALAIKA,</span></span></strong><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">  we are building the future of Financial Services with a bold vision:&nbsp;</span></span><strong><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">to become </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">the most specialized</span> <span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">Enterprise Financial Services advisory &amp; investment </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">firm in the industry</span></span></strong><span data-contrast="auto"><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text"> by co</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">upling</span> <span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">Fortune 500 board room access</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">, </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">the </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">deepest </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">Fina</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">ncial S</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">ervices </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">domain </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">expertise</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text"> with </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">a </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">global </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">V</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">enture </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">Capital </span><span data-ccp-parastyle="Body Text">&amp; Private Equity network.</span></span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:120,&quot;335559739&quot;:120,&quot;335559740&quot;:288}">&nbsp;</span></span></p>
